baseline_guidance: Run each eval with this skill and compare against a no-skill baseline or the previous skill version; pass only when the skilled run better satisfies the assertions without losing required safety or precision.

evals.prompt: Review src/components/Dashboard.tsx against the web interface guidelines.
evals.expected_output: A guideline-driven UI review with file:line findings after fetching the latest rules and reading the requested file.
assertions: Fetches the latest guideline source before reviewing.
Reads the specified file or glob.
Applies all relevant UI, UX, and accessibility rules.
